word: H7953 - שָׁלָה - shâlâh - shaw-law' - Take away

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁלה

Transliteration: shâlâh

Phonetic: shaw-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to draw out, extract

Origin: a primitive root [rather cognate (by contraction) to the base of H5394, H7997 and their congeners through the idea of extracting]

TWOT entry: 2393

Part(s) of speech: Verb
